chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. D- 660 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 08.07.2020 For orders on MA 2997/20 For orders on office objection For orders on MA 2998/20 For orders on MA /20 For hearing of main case Mr. Bharat Kumar Suthar, Advocate for Petitioners 1. Urgency application is granted. 2to5. Per learned counsel the petitioners are aggrieved by the order for attendance under Section 160 Cr.P.C., issued by the Inspector FIA Cyber Crime Reporting Center, Sukkur. The subject matter of this Petition does not come within the territorial jurisdiction of this Circuit Court, hence the office has rightly raised objection with regard to maintainability of this Petition before of this Court. Learned counsel has failed to satisfy as to how the subject matter of this Petition can be entertained by this Court. This Petition is therefore dismissed along with pending applications for want of jurisdiction leaving the Petitioners at liberty to approach Bench of this Court at Sukkur, if so advised. JUDGE JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
